esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-prometheusreceiver.otel-*
// Critical: Pebble write stalls block all writes to the store
// storage_write_stalls is a counter; any increase indicates stalls occurred
| WHERE metrics.storage_write_stalls IS NOT NULL AND metrics.storage_write_stalls > 0
| STATS stalls = MAX(metrics.storage_write_stalls)
  BY resource.attributes.service.instance.id, attributes.node_id, attributes.store
| SORT stalls DESC
